name: civil_infrastructure_staffing_model_lumen_ind_col
premise: A regulator-adjacent inquiry is live while customers are comparing notes in public channels faster than the facts can be verified. In Civil Infrastructure, the situation tagged internally around civil infrastructure staffing model lumen ind col has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Telemetry and witness accounts diverge; choosing one narrative for speed will discard evidence that may matter in court next month. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both individual and collective; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Camila Morales
agents.identity: I am Camila Morales, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Civil Infrastructure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Nadia Rahman
agents.identity: I am Nadia Rahman, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Civil Infrastructure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if individual advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for collective.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Camila Morales must choose under individual versus collective. What does Camila Morales do?
